channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 15.5%.

item.title: Byline Times: “My Personal Pride and Joy”: Mandelson’s UK Palantir Deal

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Mandelson described Starmer’s No 10 operation as ‘beleaguered and bereft’ in published files – UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Mandelson files: The key takeaways from latest release of disgraced peer’s messages with Starmer’s top ministers

item.title: The Guardian: Keir Starmer - The Guardian
Independent UK Politics: Mandelson files latest: Starmer’s No10 ‘beleaguered and bereft’ says ex-Labour peer in newly released messages
item.description: Mandelson files latest: Starmer’s No10 ‘beleaguered and bereft’ says ex-Labour peer in newly released messages

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: It's bleakly funny in its own way that Keir Starmer and Morgan McSweeney took such an avoidable and predictable risk in order to appoint someone who (correctly) had the measure of their limitations and did not agree w...
item.description: It's bleakly funny in its own way that Keir Starmer and Morgan McSweeney took such an avoidable and predictable risk in order to appoint someone who (correctly) had the measure of their limitations and did not agree w...

item.title: ITVX: Mandelson 'declined to comply' with request to hand over WhatsApp messages | ITV News - ITVX

item.title: i Politics: The secret texts that reveal the moment Starmer's authority was 'destroyed'

item.title: BBC Politics: Key messages between Mandelson and ministers so far

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Mandelson criticised Starmer’s lack of ‘verve’ and tendency to buckle under pressure
item.description: Mandelson criticised Starmer’s lack of ‘verve’ and tendency to buckle under pressure
